Additional Info
Success Story
On May 27, 2024 at about 5:16 PM, a car-to-car shooting occurred in the City of Pasadena. Both cars, occupied with
armed individuals, fled the shooting scene prior to police arrival. Utilizing Flock, officers were able to quickly identify
both vehicles involved in the shooting, which led to an arrest of a repeat violent offender.
